headline: UBS lifts Tapestry to Buy, sees 43% upside on Coach momentum and AI edge
summary: Investing.com -- UBS has upgraded its rating for Tapestry shares to Buy from Neutral and raised its price target 32% to $187, citing accelerating momentum at the Coach brand, stronger-than-expected Gen-Z customer acquisition, and the company's emerging status as an artificial intelligence leader within the retail sector.
